text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Urara... Please think this through<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it'll be fine! I don't<n>know them, but
I'm sure they're a<n>good person!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Prez wants me to meet someone<n>I've never
met before!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know the student council is involved,<n>but you still
ought to know what<n>you're getting into to be
prepared.
choice_data_list:
Yeah, that worries me too. Let me go with you,
Urara.

Yeah, that worries me too. Let me go with you,
Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Then you come too, Ayabe!<n>Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait, why am I—

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
And so, Urara, I want you gorgeously<n>adorning the
posters I'm making to<n>advertise my inn!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
I saw you on TV, during the<n>Umamusume karuta
tournament! The<n>confidence and grace you
showed is<n>perfect for representing this
establishment!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yippee! I'll do my best, of course!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Now that you're<n>on board,
I'd also really like to include<n>that girl who
suddenly joined<n>partway into the tournament!
choice_data_list: The girl who joined partway in?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The Umamusume who showed<n>up in the latter
half of the karuta<n>competition. She had this
dignified<n>prowess about her.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
If I had to describe her, I'd say she<n>was just
like... this fine lady... here...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: I-it's you! What a miraculouscoincidence! Please, you have tojoin the photo shoot for the posters!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but no.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Is, is that so? Iunderstand...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? But why? You should<n>definitely join in,
Ayabe! It's gonna<n>be so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There are plenty of otherpeople more suited to this than I am.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Like someone positive who makes<n>you happy
just looking at her. You'd<n>attract way more
customers by<n>employing someone like that. Right?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: That's wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
You really thought deeply into what<n>would be
profitable for my business!<n>How considerate of
you!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
During the tournament, what kept me<n>on the edge
of my seat was precisely<n>that contemplative
expression of<n>yours, so focused on the match!
Your<n>cooperation is just the catalyst the<n>inn
needs for business to boom!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: So please, won't you reconsider? I<n>beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'll see to it that there are<n>no
repercussions to you, your races,<n>or anything else!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Even still... I...
choice_data_list: Why don't you think it over once more?
I can't wait to see the completed posters!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not you too... Geez...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So you're coming along?! Yay, a<n>photo shoot with
Ayabe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What do you wanna do at the inn?<n>Hmm, I wonder
what they have.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I know! Hot springs! They have one,<n>right?! Let's
get in together! Hot<n>springs, hot springs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Urara, you do know we aren't going<n>there for
fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Don't you want to soak in the<n>hot springs?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I do—wait... Whether I want to or not is<n>besides the
point.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! Of course you wanna enjoy<n>the hot
springs! ♪ Let's dive in with a<n>splash!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Urara... For the last time...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Admire Vega agrees to model<n>for the
posters.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'll be there with you,<n>so you'll do
just fine!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...It's not like I don't want to do it.<n>That's not the
point...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Then, please! That indescribable aura<n>of yours—no,
that bold charm like no<n>other—I must capture it in
my posters!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident that you symbolize the<n>inn's
motto—"Hospitality with<n>Sincerity"! Not to mention
the plethora<n>of other reasons why I'm asking
you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I get it, I get it. You don'thave to keep asking.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: D-does that mean—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it. Though I don't think I'll<n>measure up to
your expectations...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't act like I already said yes. You<n>can stop it
with the flattery, too.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
It's true! The charisma you're<n>presenting in this
very moment would<n>inspire thousands if captured
in my<n>posters!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Like I said...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh ooh! I know lots of places where<n>Ayabe looks
cool! Like, the other day,<n>while we were out
running...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I see! It's guaranteed my<n>posters will turn
out fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...All right, fine! I get it, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to be this annoying,<n>it'll be less of
a hassle if I just do it.
